Step 1: Gathering Infected Devices
The first step in creating a botnet is to gather a large number of infected devices. This can be done through various means such as hacking into vulnerable computers, exploiting software bugs, or using malware to infect devices. The more devices that are infected, the larger and more powerful the botnet will be.

Step 2: Command and Control Server
Next, a command and control server needs to be set up to communicate with the infected devices. This server will receive instructions from the attacker and relay them to the bots for execution. The server can be hosted on a remote location or run locally on an infected device.
